message.content: The chemical formula for water is H₂O. H₃O⁺ (hydronium ion) is not the formula for water; it is a different species formed when water accepts a proton. There are no "2026 findings" as 2026 has not yet occurred, and the formula for water has been established as H₂O for centuries.
